ANGEL HAS WRITTEN LETTERS TO ALL OF HER PEN PALS AND IS PUTTING ALL OF THE LETTERS IN ENVELOPES. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. IF ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS, HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES DID SHE USE?  

ANGEL HAS WRITTEN 80 LETTERS IN TOTAL. THE SMALL ENVELOPES CONTAIN 20 LETTERS. TO FIND THE NUMBER OF LETTERS IN LARGE ENVELOPES, SUBTRACT 20 FROM 80. THIS GIVES 60 LETTERS IN LARGE ENVELOPES. EACH LARGE ENVELOPE HOLDS 2 LETTERS. DIVIDE 60 BY 2 TO GET THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES. THE RESULT IS 30.  

ANGEL USED 30 LARGE ENVELOPES. THE SMALL ENVELOPES CONTAIN 20 LETTERS. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF ENVELOPES IS 30 PLUS 20, WHICH IS 50. ANGEL PLACED ALL LETTERS INTO ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. THIS MAKES THE MATH SIMPLE AND CLEAR.  

LETTERS ARE PLACED INTO ENVELOPES. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS IS 80. THE SMALL ENVELOPES HOLD 20 LETTERS. THE LARGE ENVELOPES HOLD THE REST. THE LARGE ENVELOPES ARE USED MOST. EACH LARGE ENVELOPE CONTAINS 2 LETTERS. THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES IS 30.
